release.method: GitHub Release -> publish.yml -> OIDC trusted publishing (no token)
verified: build + twine check green in CI
OIDC publisher matched first try (no filename/name mismatch)
fresh venv: pip install gui4gmns (0.1.0) -> import + generate OK
release.testpypi_dry_run: skipped by owner decision (trusted-publishing failures are non-destructive); publish-testpypi.yml remains for future use

prs_merged: #1 Release v0.1.0: verified packaging + release runbook + QA scaffold
#2 Fix: guard-clean the QA report before release tag
#4 Restore v0.1.0 release docs + QA scaffold onto current main (re-applied after #1/#2 were dropped by a force-push to main; v0.1.0 on PyPI was unaffected)
prs_closed_unmerged: #3 QA: record v0.1.0 as LIVE on PyPI — superseded by #4 (built on pre-force-push main, conflicted)
